data.title: BitMart launches 7th anniversary global celebration event "7 YEARS S7RONG" with a prize pool of up to 770,000 USDT
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Cryptocurrency trading platform BitMart officially announced today the launch of its seventh anniversary celebration with the theme of "7 YEARS S7RONG". The event will run from March 10 to March 24, 2025, bringing users generous rewards and diverse participation opportunities, marking BitMart's seven years of growth and gratitude to users. Since its establishment in 2018, BitMart has been committed to "user priority, innovation-driven". The seventh anniversary event attracted global users to participate with a total reward pool of 770,000 USDT, and celebrated this important milestone with users through a series of activities such as lucky draws, trading competitions, new user reward programs, and credit card exclusives. At the same time, BitMart has also prepared a wealth of social media raffles and offline celebrations around the world. For more content, please pay attention to BitMart social media.

data.title: BTC/USDT,ETH/USDT and SOL/USDT Lead Binance USD-M Perpetual Futures Market in Trading Volume Over the Past 24 Hours
data.description: According to Binance Futures data, over the past 24 hours, the BTC/USDT, ETH/USDT, SOL/USDT, XRP/USDT, and RARE/USDT trading pairs led the USD-M perpetual futures market in trading volume. BTC/USDT perpetual futures long/short ratio: 2.7, funding rate: 0.0029%.ETH/USDT perpetual futures long/short ratio: 4.91 , funding rate: 0.0045%.SOL/USDT perpetual futures long/short ratio: 4.58, funding rate: -0.0094%.XRP/USDT perpetual futures long/short ratio: 3.44, funding rate: 0.0008%.RARE/USDT perpetual futures long/short ratio: 0.62, funding rate: -2.0000%.

data.title: CoinShares: Digital asset investment products saw a net outflow of $876 million last week
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News CoinShares latest weekly report data shows that digital asset investment products have seen outflows for the fourth consecutive week, totaling $876 million. Affected by the dual impact of falling prices and continued outflows, total assets under management (AuM) fell by $39 billion from the peak to $142 billion, the lowest point since mid-November 2024. Bitcoin saw an outflow of $756 million last week, and short Bitcoin also saw an outflow of $19.8 million, the largest outflow since December 2024. Multiple altcoins also saw outflows, including Ethereum ($89 million), Tron ($32 million), and Aave ($2.4 million). On the contrary, Solana, XRP, and Sui continued to inflow, totaling $16.4 million, $5.6 million, and $2.7 million, respectively. Blockchain-related stock ETPs also failed to escape negative sentiment, with $48 million of funds outflowed last week.

data.title: The 50x leveraged whale on Hyperliquid has now closed its position, making a profit of $2.15 million
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: According to monitoring by on-chain analyst Ai Yi, after a whale opened a long position in ETH with 50x leverage on Hyperliquid, ETH rose to a high of $2,149. All positions have now been closed to take profits, with a profit of $2.15 million in less than 40 minutes.
